summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Excel Import and LLA Generator features for Thryve Coworking Management App. All 11 backend tests passed (1 skipped), frontend UI verified working correctly for Import Data page, LLA Generator page, and Clients page.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with admin@thryve.in / password
POST /api/import/clients - Successfully imports single client with all LLA fields
POST /api/import/clients - Successfully imports multiple clients at once
POST /api/import/clients - Rejects duplicate company names with error message
POST /api/import/clients - Rejects import without company name
GET /api/companies - Returns list of companies with member counts
POST /api/import/clients - Preserves all LLA-relevant fields (signatory, GSTIN, address, seats, rates, dates)
Frontend - Import Data page loads at /admin/import with file upload and template download
Frontend - LLA Generator page loads at /admin/agreement with client dropdown and preview
Frontend - LLA Preview shows complete agreement with company details, terms, and fees
Frontend - Clients page at /admin/companies shows imported clients with stats
skipped_tests: test_get_company_by_id - Skipped when no companies exist in database
critical_code_review_comments: Excel Import API correctly validates company name requirement
Import API correctly rejects duplicate company names
All LLA fields (signatory, GSTIN, address, seats, rates, dates) preserved after import
LLA Generator correctly fetches companies from API and generates preview
Word document generation uses docx library for proper formatting
data-testid attributes present on key elements (import-data-page, agreement-page, client-select, preview-btn, download-word-btn)
Import page is hidden URL (/admin/import) - not in sidebar menu as intended
seed_data_creation: Created test company 'Demo Tech Solutions Pvt Ltd' for LLA testing, then cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Excel Import and LLA Generator features fully implemented and tested. Import API at POST /api/import/clients accepts array of client objects with Excel column mappings. LLA Generator at /admin/agreement fetches active companies from GET /api/companies and generates Leave & License Agreement preview with all imported data. Word document download uses docx library. Import page is hidden at /admin/import (not in sidebar). Admin credentials: admin@thryve.in / password

excel_import.field_mapping: ✓ Maps Excel columns to database fields

lla_generator.preview_dialog: ✓ Shows complete LLA with all fields
lla_generator.table_actions: ✓ Preview and Download buttons per client row

clients_page.stats_display: ✓ Shows Active Companies, Seats Occupied, Monthly Revenue
